description: 3-column icon grid with section heading. 6 feature cards with icon, title, and description.

fields.name: Subheading
fields.default: Powerful features designed to help you build, launch, and grow — without the usual headaches.

fields.name: Description
fields.default: A short description of this feature and why it matters.

default.Title: Lightning Fast
default.Description: Optimized for speed at every level. Your sites load in milliseconds, not seconds.

default.Title: Secure by Default
default.Description: Enterprise-grade security built in. SSL, backups, and monitoring come standard.

default.Title: Automatic Updates
default.Description: Stay current without lifting a finger. Updates deploy seamlessly in the background.

default.Title: Team Collaboration
default.Description: Invite your team, assign roles, and work together in real time on any project.

default.Title: Built-in Analytics
default.Description: Understand your audience with clear, actionable insights — no third-party tools needed.

default.Title: Fully Customizable
default.Description: Make it yours. Every element is configurable to match your brand perfectly.
